Perl 5 is a highly capable, feature-rich programming language with over

dependencies.name: perl

description:
FlameGraph is a stack trace visualizer that produces interactive SVG
flame graphs from profiling data collected by Linux perf, DTrace,
SystemTap, and other profilers. Developed by Brendan Gregg.
name: flamegraph

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
